responseMessageContents.title: Fixed an issue where the chat would incorrectly show a "report not ready" message.
responseMessageContents.description: We fixed a problem in the chat system that was blocking some helpful responses. Sometimes the system mistakenly thought a report was being promised when it wasn't, causing a "report not ready" error to appear. We've updated the system to better understand when people are just talking about time or using common words naturally, so you get the right answers without interruptions. These improvements are now live and working correctly.
